name: E J W Enterprizes
recent_news: FMCSA records (USDOT 2460951, MC 850251) show EJW Enterprises Inc. at 12428 S Honore St, Calumet Park, IL operates as a one-truck freight motor carrier hauling motor vehicles - not a school-bus or student-transportation operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. This is a single-truck freight hauler (motor vehicle transport) misclassified as student-transport; no school-bus operations, no fleet to consolidate. Remove from target list.

name: Eps Limo Inc
recent_news: Small Chicago limo/livery operator at 4034 W School St; principal Stanislaw Sawczyn. No evidence in web searches of school-district contracts, CPS vendor status, or yellow-bus/Type-I school-bus operations.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Address (4034 W School St) likely caused a false 'school' keyword hit; appears to be a 2-person Chicago limousine operator, not a school-bus contractor. No tuck-in attractiveness.

name: Ezra Medical Transportation
recent_news: Lincolnwood, IL non-emergency medical transportation provider established 2003; third-party business directories estimate <$500K revenue and 5-9 staff. No public evidence of school-district transportation contracts.
fit_notes: Not a fit. NEMT/medicar provider, not a school-bus operator; too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in even if it occasionally moves SPED riders. Deprioritize.

name: Fair Medicar & Transport Inc
recent_news: Small Chicago medicar/NEMT operator at 11840 S Artesian Ave; no public website, social presence, news, or evidence of school-district or SPED bus contracts found in targeted searches.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee medicar likely operating under Illinois Medicaid/Transdev NETSPAP brokerage, not as a Type-I/Type-II school-bus contractor; sub-scale for Summit tuck-in.

name: Family First Transportation
recent_news: No verified address, website, or principal located via targeted web search; phone (708) 331-1101 maps to south-suburban Chicago. Name is common across NEMT/livery operators nationwide and cannot be confirmed as a school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be a 2-person NEMT/livery; no school-district contracting footprint identified. Insufficient signal to advance as a Summit tuck-in target.
